issues.title: Unhandled promise rejection
issues.message: Finding: Missing error handling Evidence: async without try/catch Impact: Crash on failure Fix: Add try/catch Severity: major Confidence: high

issues.title: Unused import
issues.message: Finding: Unused import Evidence: fs imported but unused Impact: Dead code Fix: Remove import Severity: major Confidence: medium

issues.title: Missing null check
issues.message: Finding: Possible null dereference Evidence: result.data accessed without check Impact: Runtime error Fix: Add null check Severity: major Confidence: medium

issues.title: Synchronous file read
issues.message: Finding: Blocking I/O Evidence: readFileSync in hot path Impact: Performance degradation Fix: Use async readFile Severity: major Confidence: high

issues.title: Missing input validation
issues.message: Finding: User input not validated Evidence: req.body passed directly Impact: Injection risk Fix: Add validation Severity: major Confidence: high
